mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_comments (post_id, content, author_username, author_display_name, parent_id, like_count, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{content}, #{authorUsername}, #{authorDisplayName}, #{parentId}, #{likeCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_comments SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
